stories.headline: New clues emerge about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding location - USA Today
stories.summary: Clues about the Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding are dropping fast as permits are filed in New York City.

stories.headline: NBC Sets Fall Premiere Dates For ‘Chicago’ And ‘Law & Order’ Shows, ‘The Voice,’ Comedies, New Series & More - Deadline
stories.summary: NBC has set fall 2026 premiere dates for its returning drama, comedy and reality shows along with a trio of new series. See the full schedule.

stories.headline: TLC's Karen Derrico Allegedly Made Threats to Kill Ex-Husband, Kids - TMZ
stories.summary: TLC's Karen Derrico is facing criminal charges after being arrested in Las Vegas ... and prosecutors say her ex-husband and his kids were the target of alleged death threats.

stories.headline: Film Academy Invites 529 New Members: Jacob Elordi, Jenna Ortega, Teyana Taylor and More to Become Oscar Voters - Variety
stories.summary: The Academy invited 529 new members and potential Oscar voters for 2026, including Jacob Elordi, Jenna Ortega, Julia Garner and Josh O'Connor.

stories.headline: Taylor Frankie Paul's 'Bachelorette' Targeted to Run on ABC Next Month - TMZ
stories.summary: "The Bachelorette" season starring Taylor Frankie Paul is almost out of Hollywood jail ... and there's an excellent chance it'll air on ABC next month ... TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: San Antonio leader says she was unaware of Ye's antisemitic remarks - MySA
stories.summary: San Antonio's Misty Spears signed a joint letter condemning antisemitism and hateful rhetoric in response to concerns surrounding Ye's concert.

stories.headline: MSG concertgoer Paul Kueker’s daughter speaks out about dad’s fatal plunge — as she raises $58K - New York Post
stories.summary: Kloe Kueker said that the GoFundMe page will help her devastated family lay her 51-year-old father to rest.

stories.headline: FX’s ‘The Drop: A Snowfall Saga’ Sets Premiere Date - Deadline
stories.summary: FX's follow-up to 'Snowfall,' 'The Drop: A Snowfall Saga' has been given a fall premiere date.
